description: A compact Python command-line project with uv, pytest, Ruff, mypy, first-class runtime logging, agent notes, and a deterministic verification path.

generatedDocs.summary: This is a compact Python uv command-line project with tests, type checking, first-class runtime logging, agent notes, generated operations docs, and a deterministic verification path.
generatedDocs.runtime: uv owns dependency resolution and command execution. Runtime logging uses Python's standard `logging` package, defaults to quiet text logs on stderr, and supports JSON logs with `LOG_LEVEL` and `LOG_FORMAT`. Ruff owns formatting and linting, mypy owns type checking, pytest owns behavior tests, and `scripts/check` ties the full agent verification path together.
generatedDocs.firstUsefulEdit: Extend `src/python_uv_cli/cli.py`, update `tests/test_cli.py` first or in the same change, then rerun `./scripts/check`.
